interaction_phrase: bring other European countries, including Germany and the Netherlands, towards a common goal
occurrence_sentence: Beyond this powerful national dynamic, France will seek to bring other European countries, including Germany and the Netherlands, towards a common goal, with the ambition of making Europe the global center of gravity for quantum technologies.

interaction_phrase: France can and must position itself
occurrence_sentence: In the context of global recovery, France can and must position itself at the forefront of the technologies that will shape the world of tomorrow.

interaction_phrase: France has chosen to tackle with its quantum strategy
occurrence_sentence: This is the extraordinary scale of the sovereignty challenge we face, and one that France has chosen to tackle with its quantum strategy.

interaction_phrase: following the example of the world's major powers, such as the United States
occurrence_sentence: In view of the challenges of economic growth and sovereignty, and following the example of the world's major powers, such as the United States, China, the United Kingdom, and Germany, we are now implementing an ambitious national program: France has the means to seize the opportunity offered by quantum technologies and become a world leader in this field.

interaction_phrase: following the example of the world's major powers, such as China
occurrence_sentence: In view of the challenges of economic growth and sovereignty, and following the example of the world's major powers, such as the United States, China, the United Kingdom, and Germany, we are now implementing an ambitious national program: France has the means to seize the opportunity offered by quantum technologies and become a world leader in this field.

interaction_phrase: including some in France
occurrence_sentence: Several quantum start-ups, including some in France, are already developing hybrid software solutions combining supercomputers and quantum computers to discover new therapies.

interaction_phrase: contributing to Europe's strategic autonomy
occurrence_sentence: France's ambition is to be among the first nations to develop a large-scale universal quantum computer, ensuring its technological sovereignty and contributing to Europe's strategic autonomy.

interaction_phrase: support of GENCI
occurrence_sentence: With the support of GENCI (Grand Equipement National de Calcul Intensif), responsible for equipping national high-performance computing centers, and the CEA, designer and operator of the TGCC (Très Grand Centre de Calcul), France's main public computing center, France will host the world's first hybrid quantum computer infrastructure, integrating quantum accelerators into a conventional supercomputer system in terms of both software and hardware.
target_actor: Grand Equipement National de Calcul Intensif (GENCI)

interaction_phrase: and the CEA
occurrence_sentence: With the support of GENCI (Grand Equipement National de Calcul Intensif), responsible for equipping national high-performance computing centers, and the CEA, designer and operator of the TGCC (Très Grand Centre de Calcul), France's main public computing center, France will host the world's first hybrid quantum computer infrastructure, integrating quantum accelerators into a conventional supercomputer system in terms of both software and hardware.
target_actor: Commissariat à l'énergie atomique et aux énergies alternatives (CEA)

interaction_phrase: Europe, and France in particular
occurrence_sentence: Europe, and France in particular, have been pioneers in these technologies.

interaction_phrase: France will continue to participate in the European work carried out within EuroQCI
occurrence_sentence: In addition, France will continue to participate in the European work carried out within EuroQCI.

interaction_phrase: the French Tech Souveraineté fund will complete the system by providing the necessary support to protect the capital of strategic companies
occurrence_sentence: Finally, the French Tech Souveraineté fund will complete the system by providing the necessary support to protect the capital of strategic companies.

interaction_phrase: joint co-financing by the Commission
occurrence_sentence: Through leverage, government action will mobilize more than €200 million from Europe, part of which will come from joint co-financing by the Commission, supplemented by national funding.

interaction_phrase: co-financed by the EuroHPC joint undertaking, bringing together France
occurrence_sentence: A consortium is already in the works, co-financed by the EuroHPC joint undertaking, bringing together France, Germany, Italy, Spain, Ireland, and Austria, to develop the first prototype of a hybrid computer incorporating a quantum accelerator of at least 100 qubits by 2023, at the Très Grand Centre de Calcul site in Bruyères-Le-Chatel.

interaction_phrase: European Commission's efforts in the field of high-performance computing, notably through the EuroHPC Joint Undertaking
occurrence_sentence: It should also be noted that the topic of quantum computing is gaining momentum as part of the European Commission's efforts in the field of high-performance computing, notably through the EuroHPC Joint Undertaking.

interaction_phrase: France will be a driving force in intensifying the long-standing joint research dynamics with the major quantum technology nations in Europe
occurrence_sentence: In addition, France will be a driving force in intensifying the long-standing joint research dynamics with the major quantum technology nations in Europe (the Netherlands, England, etc.), exploring all opportunities for collaboration with the ambition of repositioning the global center of gravity for quantum technologies towards Europe.

interaction_phrase: under the responsibility of
occurrence_sentence: Finally, the strategy will be implemented by an interministerial coordinator, who will oversee its implementation under the responsibility of the Interministerial Council for Innovation, with a constant focus on maximizing industrial impact, employment, and the creation of sustainable economic value.

interaction_phrase: with the help of
occurrence_sentence: Qubit Pharmaceuticals, a French research spin-off start-up (CNAM, CNRS, Sorbonne, University of Texas at Austin, Washington University), has just completed a pre-seed round of funding with the help of Quantonation.

interaction_phrase: based on the use of SQUID (Superconductor Quantum Interference Device) networks
occurrence_sentence: Thales develops a superconducting quantum antenna based on the use of SQUID (Superconductor Quantum Interference Device) networks capable of detecting a wide spectrum of frequencies.
target_actor: Commissariat à l'énergie atomique et aux énergies alternatives (CEA)
